message.content:
You are working in /Users/bhyslop/projects/rbm_alpha_recipemuster. You must write code. NEVER use `cd`.

## Task: Create rbgm_gitlab_setup() guide + tabtarget + zipper enrollment

### 1. Add `rbgm_gitlab_setup()` to rbgm_ManualProcedures.sh

Add a new function BEFORE the `rbgm_LEGACY_setup_admin` function (before line 389) in `/Users/bhyslop/projects/rbm_alpha_recipemuster/Tools/rbw/rbgm_ManualProcedures.sh`.

The function should use the `bug_*` pattern (NOT the old `zrbgm_*` pattern). Look at `rbgm_payor_establish()` and `rbgm_quota_build()` for the exact style. All bug_* functions emit to stderr.

Function pattern:
```bash
rbgm_gitlab_setup() {
  zrbgm_sentinel

  buc_doc_brief "Display GitLab rubric repo setup guide for CB v2 connections"
  buc_doc_shown || return 0

  bug_section  "GitLab Rubric Repo Setup Guide"
  bug_t        "Recipe Bottle uses GitLab (not GitHub) for the rubric repo connection."
  bug_t        "This is required before running depot_create."
  bug_e
  bug_section  "Why GitLab (not GitHub)?"
  bug_t        "  GitHub classic PATs grant 'repo' scope across ALL repositories the token"
  bug_t        "  owner can access. Fine-grained PATs are rejected by Cloud Build v2 connections"
  bug_t        "  (Google Issue Tracker #343223837). Machine accounts are an alternative but add"
  bug_t        "  organizational overhead."
  bug_e
  bug_t        "  GitLab project access tokens are inherently repository-scoped — they cannot"
  bug_t        "  access resources outside the associated project. One token, one repo, minimal scope."
  bug_e
  bug_section  "Key:"
  bug_tu       "   Magenta text refers to " "precise words you see on the web page."
  bug_tc       "   Cyan text is " "something you might copy from here."
  bug_link     "   Clickable links look like " "EXAMPLE DOT COM" "https://example.com/" " (often, ${ZRBGM_CLICK_MOD} + mouse click)"
  bug_e
  bug_section  "1. Create GitLab Account (if needed):"
  bug_link     "   Go to: " "GitLab Sign Up" "https://gitlab.com/users/sign_up"
  bug_t        "   Create a free account if you don't already have one."
  bug_e
  bug_section  "2. Create a GitLab Project for the Rubric Repo:"
  bug_link     "   Go to: " "GitLab New Project" "https://gitlab.com/projects/new#blank_project"
  bug_t        "   Configure:"
  bug_tc       "     - Project name: " "rb-rubric"
  bug_tut      "     - Visibility Level: " "Private" " (recommended)"
  bug_tut      "     - Check " "Initialize repository with a README" " (repo must not be empty)"
  bug_tu       "   Click " "Create project"
  bug_e
  bug_section  "3. Set RBRR_RUBRIC_REPO_URL in rbrr.env:"
  bug_t        "   After creation, copy the HTTPS clone URL from the project page."
  bug_tc       "   Example: " "RBRR_RUBRIC_REPO_URL=https://gitlab.com/yourname/rb-rubric.git"
  bug_t        "   Edit your rbrr.env file and set this value."
  bug_e
  bug_section  "4. Create a Project Access Token:"
  bug_t        "   From your rubric repo project page:"
  bug_link     "   Go to: " "Project Settings → Access Tokens" "https://gitlab.com/" " (navigate via left sidebar)"
  bug_tu       "   1. Click " "Add new token"
  bug_t        "   2. Configure:"
  bug_tc       "      - Token name: " "rb-depot"
  bug_tu       "      - Role: " "Maintainer"
  bug_tu       "      - Scopes: check " "api" " (includes read_api)"
  bug_t        "      - Expiration: set as needed (or leave default)"
  bug_tu       "   3. Click " "Create project access token"
  bug_tW       "   4. " "CRITICAL: Copy the token immediately — it won't be shown again"
  bug_e
  bug_section  "5. Run Depot Create:"
  bug_t        "   Pipe the token to depot_create via stdin:"
  bug_c        "   printf '%s\\n' \"YOUR_TOKEN\" | ./tt/rbw-PC.PayorCreatesDepot.sh <depot-name>"
  bug_e
  bug_t        "   Next step:"
  buc_next "rbw-PC"

  buc_success "GitLab rubric repo setup guide displayed"
}
```

### 2. Create tabtarget file

Create `/Users/bhyslop/projects/rbm_alpha_recipemuster/tt/rbw-Pgl.PayorGitlabSetupGuide.sh` with this exact content:
```bash
#!/bin/bash
export BURD_LAUNCHER=".buk/launcher.rbw_workbench.sh"
exec "${BASH_SOURCE[0]%/*}/../${BURD_LAUNCHER}" "${0##*/}" "${@}"
```

Then make it executable: `chmod +x /Users/bhyslop/projects/rbm_alpha_recipemuster/tt/rbw-Pgl.PayorGitlabSetupGuide.sh`

### 3. Add zipper enrollment

In `/Users/bhyslop/projects/rbm_alpha_recipemuster/Tools/rbw/rbz_zipper.sh`, add a new enrollment line AFTER the `RBZ_QUOTA_BUILD` line (line 47). The new line should be:

```bash
  buz_enroll RBZ_GITLAB_SETUP    "rbw-Pgl" "${z_mod}" "rbgm_gitlab_setup"
```

This goes in the same `z_mod="rbgm_cli.sh"` block (lines 44-47), so it shares the same module.

Do all three tasks. The file paths are absolute.

1→#!/bin/bash
     2→#

    18→#
    19→# RBW Zipper - Colophon registry for RBW workbench dispatch
    20→
    21→set -euo pipefail
    22→
    23→# Multiple inclusion guard
    24→test -z "${ZRBZ_SOURCED:-}" || return 0
    25→ZRBZ_SOURCED=1
    26→
    27→######################################################################
    28→# Colophon registry initialization
    29→
    30→# shellcheck disable=SC2034,SC2154
    31→zrbz_kindle() {
    32→  test -z "${ZRBZ_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "rbz already kindled"
    33→
    34→  # Verify buz zipper is kindled (CLI furnish must kindle buz first)
    35→  zbuz_sentinel
    36→
    37→  # Payor depot/governor commands
    38→  local z_mod="rbgp_cli.sh"
    39→  buz_enroll RBZ_CREATE_DEPOT   "rbw-PC" "${z_mod}" "rbgp_depot_create"
    40→  buz_enroll RBZ_PAYOR_INSTALL  "rbw-PI" "${z_mod}" "rbgp_payor_install"
    41→  buz_enroll RBZ_DESTROY_DEPOT  "rbw-PD" "${z_mod}" "rbgp_depot_destroy"
    42→  buz_enroll RBZ_GOVERNOR_RESET "rbw-PG" "${z_mod}" "rbgp_governor_reset"
    43→  # Payor guide/manual procedures (rbgm_cli.sh)
    44→  z_mod="rbgm_cli.sh"
    45→  buz_enroll RBZ_PAYOR_ESTABLISH "rbw-Pg" "${z_mod}" "rbgm_payor_establish"
    46→  buz_enroll RBZ_PAYOR_REFRESH   "rbw-PR" "${z_mod}" "rbgm_payor_refresh"
    47→  buz_enroll RBZ_QUOTA_BUILD     "rbw-gqb" "${z_mod}" "rbgm_quota_build"
    48→
    49→  # Payor depot operations (rbgp_cli.sh)
    50→  z_mod="rbgp_cli.sh"
    51→  buz_enroll RBZ_LIST_DEPOT  "rbw-Pl" "${z_mod}" "rbgp_depot_list"
    52→
    53→  # Governor commands
    54→  z_mod="rbgg_cli.sh"
    55→  buz_enroll RBZ_CREATE_RETRIEVER "rbw-GR" "${z_mod}" "rbgg_create_retriever"
    56→  buz_enroll RBZ_CREATE_DIRECTOR  "rbw-GD" "${z_mod}" "rbgg_create_director"
    57→
    58→  z_mod="rbgg_cli.sh"
    59→  buz_enroll RBZ_LIST_SERVICE_ACCOUNTS  "rbw-Gl" "${z_mod}" "rbgg_list_service_accounts"
    60→  buz_enroll RBZ_DELETE_SERVICE_ACCOUNT "rbw-GS" "${z_mod}" "rbgg_delete_service_account"
    61→
    62→  # Retriever/Image commands (rbw-R* colophon family → rbf_cli.sh)
    63→  z_mod="rbf_cli.sh"
    64→  buz_enroll RBZ_CONJURE_ARK     "rbw-DC" "${z_mod}" "rbf_build"
    65→  buz_enroll RBZ_ABJURE_ARK      "rbw-DA" "${z_mod}" "rbf_abjure"
    66→  buz_enroll RBZ_BESEECH_ARK     "rbw-DB" "${z_mod}" "rbf_beseech"
    67→  buz_enroll RBZ_SUMMON_ARK      "rbw-DS" "${z_mod}" "rbf_summon"
    68→  buz_enroll RBZ_RUBRIC_INSCRIBE "rbw-DI" "${z_mod}" "rbf_rubric_inscribe"
    69→  buz_enroll RBZ_DELETE_IMAGE    "rbw-DD" "${z_mod}" "rbf_delete"
    70→  buz_enroll RBZ_LIST_IMAGES     "rbw-Rl" "${z_mod}" "rbf_list"
    71→  buz_enroll RBZ_RETRIEVE_IMAGE  "rbw-Rr" "${z_mod}" "rbf_retrieve"
    72→  z_mod="rbrr_cli.sh"
    73→  buz_enroll RBZ_REFRESH_GCB_PINS "rbw-DP" "${z_mod}" "rbrr_refresh_gcb_pins"
    74→
    75→  # Nameplate regime operations
    76→  z_mod="rbrn_cli.sh"
    77→  buz_enroll RBZ_RENDER_NAMEPLATE   "rbw-rnr" "${z_mod}" "rbrn_render"   "param1"
    78→  buz_enroll RBZ_VALIDATE_NAMEPLATE "rbw-rnv" "${z_mod}" "rbrn_validate" "param1"
    79→
    80→  # Vessel regime operations
    81→  z_mod="rbrv_cli.sh"
    82→  buz_enroll RBZ_RENDER_VESSEL   "rbw-rvr" "${z_mod}" "rbrv_render"   "param1"
    83→  buz_enroll RBZ_VALIDATE_VESSEL "rbw-rvv" "${z_mod}" "rbrv_validate" "param1"
    84→
    85→  # Repo regime operations
    86→  z_mod="rbrr_cli.sh"
    87→  buz_enroll RBZ_RENDER_REPO      "rbw-rrr" "${z_mod}" "rbrr_render"
    88→  buz_enroll RBZ_VALIDATE_REPO    "rbw-rrv" "${z_mod}" "rbrr_validate"
    89→
    90→  # Payor regime operations
    91→  z_mod="rbrp_cli.sh"
    92→  buz_enroll RBZ_RENDER_PAYOR   "rbw-rpr" "${z_mod}" "rbrp_render"
    93→  buz_enroll RBZ_VALIDATE_PAYOR "rbw-rpv" "${z_mod}" "rbrp_validate"
    94→
    95→  # OAuth regime operations
    96→  z_mod="rbro_cli.sh"
    97→  buz_enroll RBZ_RENDER_OAUTH   "rbw-ror" "${z_mod}" "rbro_render"
    98→  buz_enroll RBZ_VALIDATE_OAUTH "rbw-rov" "${z_mod}" "rbro_validate"
    99→
   100→  # Station regime operations
   101→  z_mod="rbrs_cli.sh"
   102→  buz_enroll RBZ_RENDER_STATION   "rbw-rsr" "${z_mod}" "rbrs_render"
   103→  buz_enroll RBZ_VALIDATE_STATION "rbw-rsv" "${z_mod}" "rbrs_validate"
   104→
   105→  # Auth regime operations
   106→  z_mod="rbra_cli.sh"
   107→  buz_enroll RBZ_RENDER_AUTH   "rbw-rar" "${z_mod}" "rbra_render"   "param1"
   108→  buz_enroll RBZ_VALIDATE_AUTH "rbw-rav" "${z_mod}" "rbra_validate" "param1"
   109→  buz_enroll RBZ_LIST_AUTH     "rbw-ral" "${z_mod}" "rbra_list"
   110→
   111→  # Nameplate regime list
   112→  z_mod="rbrn_cli.sh"
   113→  buz_enroll RBZ_LIST_NAMEPLATES "rbw-rnl" "${z_mod}" "rbrn_list"
   114→
   115→  # Cross-nameplate operations
   116→  buz_enroll RBZ_SURVEY_NAMEPLATES "rbw-ni" "${z_mod}" "rbrn_survey"
   117→  buz_enroll RBZ_AUDIT_NAMEPLATES  "rbw-nv" "${z_mod}" "rbrn_audit"
   118→
   119→  # Bottle operations (imprint channel sets BUZ_FOLIO from BURD_TOKEN_3)
   120→  z_mod="rbob_cli.sh"
   121→  buz_enroll RBZ_BOTTLE_START   "rbw-s" "${z_mod}" "rbob_start"          "imprint"
   122→  buz_enroll RBZ_BOTTLE_STOP    "rbw-z" "${z_mod}" "rbob_stop"           "imprint"
   123→  buz_enroll RBZ_BOTTLE_SENTRY  "rbw-S" "${z_mod}" "rbob_connect_sentry" "imprint"
   124→  buz_enroll RBZ_BOTTLE_CENSER  "rbw-C" "${z_mod}" "rbob_connect_censer" "imprint"
   125→  buz_enroll RBZ_BOTTLE_CONNECT "rbw-B" "${z_mod}" "rbob_connect_bottle" "imprint"
   126→  buz_enroll RBZ_BOTTLE_OBSERVE "rbw-o" "${z_mod}" "rbob_observe"        "imprint"
   127→
   128→  # Qualification operations
   129→  z_mod="rbq_cli.sh"
   130→  buz_enroll RBZ_QUALIFY_ALL "rbw-qa" "${z_mod}" "qualify_all"
   131→
   132→  # Test operations (module is testbench, command is colophon)
   133→  z_mod="rbtb_testbench.sh"
   134→  buz_enroll RBZ_TEST_ALL                "rbw-ta"  "${z_mod}" "rbw-ta"
   135→  buz_enroll RBZ_TEST_SUITE              "rbw-ts"  "${z_mod}" "rbw-ts"
   136→  buz_enroll RBZ_TEST_ONE                "rbw-to"  "${z_mod}" "rbw-to"
   137→  buz_enroll RBZ_TEST_NAMEPLATE          "rbw-tn"  "${z_mod}" "rbw-tn"
   138→  buz_enroll RBZ_TEST_REGIME             "rbw-trg" "${z_mod}" "rbw-trg"
   139→  buz_enroll RBZ_TEST_REGIME_CREDENTIALS "rbw-trc" "${z_mod}" "rbw-trc"
   140→  buz_enroll RBZ_TEST_SWEEP              "rbw-tw"  "${z_mod}" "rbw-tw"
   141→
   142→  readonly ZRBZ_KINDLED=1
   143→}
   144→
   145→######################################################################
   146→# Healthcheck (validates all enrolled tabtargets exist on disk)
   147→
   148→zrbz_healthcheck() {
   149→  zrbz_sentinel
   150→  buz_healthcheck
   151→}
   152→
   153→######################################################################
   154→# Internal sentinel
   155→
   156→zrbz_sentinel() {
   157→  test "${ZRBZ_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module rbz not kindled - call zrbz_kindle first"
   158→}
   159→
   160→# eof
   161→

rbgm_gitlab_setup() {
  zrbgm_sentinel

  buc_doc_brief "Display GitLab rubric repo setup guide for CB v2 connections"
  buc_doc_shown || return 0

  bug_section  "GitLab Rubric Repo Setup Guide"
  bug_t        "Recipe Bottle uses GitLab (not GitHub) for the rubric repo connection."
  bug_t        "This is required before running depot_create."
  bug_e
  bug_section  "Why GitLab (not GitHub)?"
  bug_t        "  GitHub classic PATs grant 'repo' scope across ALL repositories the token"
  bug_t        "  owner can access. Fine-grained PATs are rejected by Cloud Build v2 connections"
  bug_t        "  (Google Issue Tracker #343223837). Machine accounts are an alternative but add"
  bug_t        "  organizational overhead."
  bug_e
  bug_t        "  GitLab project access tokens are inherently repository-scoped — they cannot"
  bug_t        "  access resources outside the associated project. One token, one repo, minimal scope."
  bug_e
  bug_section  "Key:"
  bug_tu       "   Magenta text refers to " "precise words you see on the web page."
  bug_tc       "   Cyan text is " "something you might copy from here."
  bug_link     "   Clickable links look like " "EXAMPLE DOT COM" "https://example.com/" " (often, ${ZRBGM_CLICK_MOD} + mouse click)"
  bug_e
  bug_section  "1. Create GitLab Account (if needed):"
  bug_link     "   Go to: " "GitLab Sign Up" "https://gitlab.com/users/sign_up"
  bug_t        "   Create a free account if you don't already have one."
  bug_e
  bug_section  "2. Create a GitLab Project for the Rubric Repo:"
  bug_link     "   Go to: " "GitLab New Project" "https://gitlab.com/projects/new#blank_project"
  bug_t        "   Configure:"
  bug_tc       "     - Project name: " "rb-rubric"
  bug_tut      "     - Visibility Level: " "Private" " (recommended)"
  bug_tut      "     - Check " "Initialize repository with a README" " (repo must not be empty)"
  bug_tu       "   Click " "Create project"
  bug_e
  bug_section  "3. Set RBRR_RUBRIC_REPO_URL in rbrr.env:"
  bug_t        "   After creation, copy the HTTPS clone URL from the project page."
  bug_tc       "   Example: " "RBRR_RUBRIC_REPO_URL=https://gitlab.com/yourname/rb-rubric.git"
  bug_t        "   Edit your rbrr.env file and set this value."
  bug_e
  bug_section  "4. Create a Project Access Token:"
  bug_t        "   From your rubric repo project page:"
  bug_link     "   Go to: " "Project Settings → Access Tokens" "https://gitlab.com/" " (navigate via left sidebar)"
  bug_tu       "   1. Click " "Add new token"
  bug_t        "   2. Configure:"
  bug_tc       "      - Token name: " "rb-depot"
  bug_tu       "      - Role: " "Maintainer"
  bug_tu       "      - Scopes: check " "api" " (includes read_api)"
  bug_t        "      - Expiration: set as needed (or leave default)"
  bug_tu       "   3. Click " "Create project access token"
  bug_tW       "   4. " "CRITICAL: Copy the token immediately — it won't be shown again"
  bug_e
  bug_section  "5. Run Depot Create:"
  bug_t        "   Pipe the token to depot_create via stdin:"
  bug_c        "   printf '%s\\n' \"YOUR_TOKEN\" | ./tt/rbw-PC.PayorCreatesDepot.sh <depot-name>"
  bug_e
  bug_t        "   Next step:"
  buc_next "rbw-PC"

  buc_success "GitLab rubric repo setup guide displayed"
}
